Container.Name: StreamBox
Container.Overview: StreamBox - Virtual desktop container for RTMP streaming. Features a full desktop environment with Firefox, VLC, and FFmpeg streaming. Control via web-based VNC (noVNC), native VNC client, or SSH. Includes a built-in stream control panel with live stats. Stream your desktop to any RTMP server at up to 1080p 60fps.
Container.Description: StreamBox provides a virtual desktop that streams to an RTMP server. Access the desktop via your browser (noVNC), VNC client, or SSH. Includes Firefox, VLC, and a stream control panel.

Config.Name: noVNC Web Port
Config.Description: Port for web-based VNC access (noVNC). Access the desktop in your browser.

Config.Name: VNC Port
Config.Description: Port for native VNC client access (TightVNC, RealVNC, etc).

Config.Name: SSH Port
Config.Description: Port for SSH access. Connect with: ssh root@SERVER_IP -p 2222

Config.Name: RTMP Server URL
Config.Description: Your RTMP server URL (e.g. rtmp://192.168.1.100:1935/live or rtmp://a.rtmp.youtube.com/live2)

Config.Name: Stream Key
Config.Description: Your stream key or stream name. This is appended to the RTMP URL.

Config.Name: VNC Password
Config.Description: Password for VNC access (both web and native client).

Config.Name: Stream FPS
Config.Description: Frames per second for the RTMP stream (30 or 60 recommended).

Config.Name: Video Bitrate
Config.Description: Video bitrate for the stream (e.g. 2500k, 4500k, 6000k). Higher = better quality but more bandwidth.

Config.Name: Config Storage
Config.Description: Persistent storage for StreamBox configuration and data.

Config.Name: Media Files
Config.Description: Optional: Mount your media library for playback in VLC (read-only).
